title: Associate
practice_areas: a public beauty and wellness company in an ongoing SEC investigation involving revenue recognition and other accounting issues
multiple high-profile defendants in various prosecutions by the SEC and the DOJ
corporations in connection with preemptive internal investigations and investigations by governmental agencies
Mr. Abbas maintains an active pro bono practice and has represented:
multiple asylum seekers fleeing persecution in their country of origin
a youth shelter pro bono organization in responding to subpoenas seeking medical records of housed youth
a nonprofit organization in obtaining documents related to a public records request against the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department
